{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211230545879F4E8186CB25F0A5F"}"},"total":74},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562379720518714137","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一点也木有ooc的感觉，而且角色超自然！很舒服！无论是名柯方还是原神方的角色都感觉像是原角色会做出来的样子。特别好看的一篇文！多推多推[爱慕][爱慕]节奏也很舒服，双子的人设羁绊情感目前来看把控的也很好。感觉是个潜力股，作者一定要加油啊[爱心][爱心]","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"超自然","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%85%E8%87%AA%E7%84%B6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067454B25F0A5F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227562379720518714137%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227524859957972307006%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%85%E8%87%AA%E7%84%B6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760756563,"group_id":"7524859957972307006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5/CJHm01ou9j+58FMvAbUiQsZ17chXMEjtZmBi+AiGk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3311382085514284","user_name":"喜欢龙爪树的李秀娴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3311382085514284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524859957972307006","book_info":{"abstract":"【原神】+【名柯】

旅程已然到达终点，但，意外突然发生。
提瓦特大陆被卷入空间风暴，撞进了一个陌生的世界。
这个世界不存在神明，也没有元素力，有的只有各种各样的案件和隐藏在地下的黑暗势力。
为了回家，提瓦特开始了努力。
注意：
1、旅行者空；
2、提瓦特众无CP，名柯走新兰平和快青真圆父母组警视厅组；
3、提瓦特立场不定，但因为角色的性格特点，整体偏红；
4、提瓦特整个撞进了名柯，所以……
5、不要在我的作品下玩烂梗，什么老登、酒蒙子、街溜子、卢锅巴，都不允许！不要用熊孩子、不懂礼貌、莽撞无脑之类的词汇来评价柯南，不喜欢小柯为什么要看名柯以及他的衍生？可以理智评价，但不要带着有色眼镜看待他。还有赤老师，他和小柯简直是重灾区。我不反对一些无伤大雅的小玩笑，我也很喜欢看他们三观炸裂，瞳孔地震，但我很讨厌那种非常恶劣、能给角色留下一辈子心理阴影的迫害；
6、不要提及其他作品，也不要在其他作品下面提及我的作品；
7、上两条建立在有人会看的情况下；
8、游戏没更完，不确定的东西暂时不会写；
9、OOC预警，尽量不OOC，但限于文笔肯定会OOC，不喜欢的请及时止损。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o785c5575ec6ba3ff838b33cc62cac7cd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"素言锦心","author_id":"","book_id":"7524859957972307006","book_name":"柯学的提瓦特","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8478人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534689666633564697","read_count":"8478","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"407222"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"188","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,综漫,二次元,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o785c5575ec6ba3ff838b33cc62cac7cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251454&x-signature=2M%2FRslqc2msL7EUnKSsw%2FAJ5Ock%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2739606328719307","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211230545879F4E8186CB25F0A5F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2514,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4677},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604895692578407192","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！原和柯双方都有相应的戏份和主线，协调的很好哦！人物就我个人认为没有ooc，好看！
剧情方面是原的剧情线结束后，提瓦特落入名柯世界，世界融合，原方大部分角色沉睡，兄妹相认，双方（旅行者空和深渊公主荧）一起对抗入侵名柯世界的深渊（这是大体剧情，主要还是日常）
原神方面 人物群像，作者也在尽可能地调整人物的出场率，人物融入的挺好的
名柯方面 警校五人组存活，意难平能救都有救（大概），人物毒点被作者尽量弱化了，大家都很好！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770654998,"group_id":"7524859957972307006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyGy81NWp84G0sQ+EQtb2Nn01ah+dVHu3biHcnDPl5NC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0eefb309cfcc48698b530a587ded7f34~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614407&x-signature=Y%2F9IcvWae1ej3Xcw6Cbb8C7pp64%3D","user_id":"3741010832405860","user_name":"鲸月落"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3741010832405860","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524859957972307006","book_info":{"abstract":"【原神】+【名柯】

5、不要在我的作品下玩烂梗，什么老登、酒蒙子、街溜子、卢锅巴，都不允许！不要用熊孩子、不懂礼貌、莽撞无脑之类的词汇来评价柯南，不喜欢小柯为什么要看名柯以及他的衍生？可以理智评价，但不要带着有色眼镜看待他。还有赤老师，他和小柯简直是重灾区。我不反对一些无伤大雅的小玩笑，我也很喜欢看他们三观炸裂，瞳孔地震，但我很讨厌那种非常恶劣、能给角色留下一辈子心理阴影的迫害；
6、不要提及其他作品，也不要在其他作品下面提及我的作品；
7、上两条建立在有人会看的情况下；
8、游戏没更完，不确定的东西暂时不会写；
